channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping behind 37 Forsyth Gardens, 29th June
item.description:
Builders rubble dumped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-36, Forsyth Gardens, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown trees around base of trees, 29th June
item.description:
There are 2 trees either side of the road at 8 Queenswood Rd. The base of the trees are well overgrown and now impeding the road. Please could these be cut back asap? A couple of trees in the road were cutback last week and they were nowhere near as bad as these ones.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queenswood Road, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish chute, 29th June
item.description:
A resident injured themselves today opening the rubbish chute.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Winchester Avenue, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish sacks dumped on the corner of fontwell drive, 29th June
item.description:
Rubbish sacks dumped on the corner of fontwell drive
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fontwell Drive, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trip hazard from tree roots, 29th June
item.description:
Reported previously months ago. Defect getting worse. Have tripped over it numerous times.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hargwyne Street, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household waste dumped in street, 29th June
item.description:
Outside 96 Hargwyne st

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hargwyne Street, Stockwell, Greater London

item.title: Parking sign knocked over & pavement torn up, 29th June
item.description:
Morrisons Van was reversing at 4am and knocked over the sign.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Empress Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Clarence Road sign, 29th June
item.description:
Broken glass

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Torbay Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal removal of tree in conservation area, 29th June
item.description:
A number of mature trees have been cut down by the new owners of no 3 White Oak Gardens contrary to the rules of the conservation area and in breach of the restrictive covenants that apply. These require trees can only be removed if diseased and must be replaced. This is while a planning application is being made which states that the owner will not remove any trees.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, White Oak Gardens, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Penrose house flat block rubbish chute blocked, 29th June
item.description:
Hello - situation has worsened and there are now more flies and the smell is worse. The rubbish is trapped (our flat does not use this chute!) and it is affecting first floor of Penrose house (block of flats 53-68)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Carter Place, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two blocked drains, 29th June
item.description:
Two blocked drains

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21, Madeline Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London

item.title: Hole in pathway, 29th June
item.description:
This hole is getting larger

item.title: Huge overgrown weeds on emsworth, 29th June
item.description:
The weeds growing up between walls and pavements are huge. Please clear them

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Emsworth Street, Streatham Hill, Greater London

item.title: Disgusting rubbish heap, 29th June

item.title: Dumped waste, 29th June

Waste dumped outside 64 Little Heath, been there for few days.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Little Heath, Charlton

item.title: Flytip, 29th June
item.description:
Flytipped paint cans at bin on St Keverne Road J/W Castlecombe Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Keverne Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Boxes and unknown Canisters., 29th June
item.description:
After alot of unruley noise and disturbance last night, i heard banging on my wall which atartled my Son at nearly midnight. He couldn't sleep because of how loud everyone was. As soon as i heard the noise on my wall i went straight outside and confronted the boy who was standing there who said it wasn't him who dumped the boxes etc. I called the police TWICE. Who did absolutely nothing. This rubbish has been left here and has even ventured across the road. So needs to be collected please. Thanks.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lemmon Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress frame dumped, 29th June
item.description:
On pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 243+245, Elmers End Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish in park , bins overflowing, 29th June
item.description:
I was at the park at 8.30am , gardeners were there , I assumed they would deal with overflowing bins and scattered picnic rubbish . I again walked around the park at 17.30pm , a lot of same rubbish still there . Broken bottle near to children’s playground .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Croydon Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter everywhere, 29th June
item.description:
The usual build up of litter and flytipped items up and down the length of Faversham Road and Burrell Row. Please clear area.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Faversham Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
